name: finance-research
title: Finance & Investment Research
industry: Asset management, sell-side / buy-side research, corporate finance
description: Adapts the harness to produce investment research — equity/credit notes, valuation memos, deal screens — where the failure mode is an unsupported figure or an untraceable assumption, not a failing build.

stages.label: Frame
stages.purpose: Define the security/issuer, the mandate, the question, and the constraints (horizon, risk tolerance, restricted-list status).
stages.output: Scope note: subject, mandate, decision needed

stages.label: Thesis
stages.purpose: State the investment thesis, the valuation approach, and every forecast assumption before any number is written. The plan the draft must follow.

stages.label: Draft
stages.purpose: Write the memo: model, figures, narrative — each figure carrying a source, each assumption traceable to the brief.

stages.label: Review breadth
stages.purpose: Scan every section for completeness and internal consistency; flag missing sections, orphan figures, unsupported claims.

stages.label: Review depth
stages.purpose: Run the gate verdicts: data provenance, assumption traceability, valuation coherence, risk & disclosure, mandate fit.

stages.label: Feedback
stages.purpose: Evaluate reviewer challenges, reconcile the recommendation, finalize disclosures.

gates.name: Data Provenance
gates.question: Does every figure trace to a cited, dated source (filing, data vendor, management) — none invented or stale?

gates.name: Assumption Traceability
gates.question: Is each forecast assumption stated explicitly, justified, and consistent between the narrative and the model?

gates.name: Valuation Coherence
gates.question: Does the valuation method fit the asset, and do the component figures reconcile to the headline value?

gates.name: Risk & Disclosure
gates.question: Are the material risks, conflicts of interest, and required disclosures present and specific (not boilerplate)?

gates.name: Mandate Fit
gates.question: Does the recommendation match the stated mandate and risk profile, and are reusable model components factored out rather than re-derived?
